footer.description: Nova Baie creates premium websites for tourism professionals who want to better showcase their image and offerings.

common.response24h: Response within 24h · Free quote · No commitment

hero.title:
Premium websites
for tourism professionals
hero.description: Nova Baie creates premium websites for concierge services, tourist accommodations, seasonal rentals and hospitality businesses — from the Bay of Somme to all of France — who want to better showcase their image and convert more visitors.
hero.imageAlt: Premium websites for tourism professionals - Nova Baie

target.title: Websites designed for tourism professionals who want greater visibility
target.description: Nova Baie addresses tourism businesses that want more than just an elegant website — a tool capable of improving their image, SEO, and ability to generate bookings.

offers.title: A website matched to your ambition
offers.description: 3 levels of support based on your objectives: gain visibility, convert better, or grow your business.

items.name: Presence
items.intention: To exist with a professional image and inspire trust from the very first visit.

items.name: Conversion
items.intention: To transform your website into a business tool that generates real inquiries.

items.name: Acquisition
items.intention: To make your website a long-term growth and acquisition driver.

reasons.title: A more relevant approach than a generalist agency
reasons.description: Nova Baie doesn't start from a purely technical logic. The website is designed as a tool for image, clarity and conversion.
reasons.statsNote: Blue Baie Conciergerie data — summer seasons 2024 and 2025

items.title: Real tourism specialization
items.description: Nova Baie works with accommodation professionals, hospitality businesses and tourism service providers.

items.title: A more premium image
items.description: Your website shouldn't just exist. It should reassure, enhance and better present your offering.

items.title: A structure built to convert
items.description: Clear navigation, strong hierarchy, useful content and a journey oriented towards contact.

items.title: An approach grounded in reality
items.description: The Blue Baie connection brings concrete understanding of the field, client expectations and image challenges.

work.title: Projects designed to elevate an image, not just fill pages
work.description: The website must inspire trust within the first few seconds. Each Nova Baie project is designed to showcase an identity, an offering and a level of service.

projects.title: Gîtes en Baie
projects.description: Showcase website for a property owner managing several holiday cottages in the Bay of Somme. Full property catalogue, Airbnb & Booking review integration, booking system and regional discovery pages.

projects.title: Le Refuge de la Marmotte
projects.description: Showcase website for a 4-person ski apartment at the foot of the slopes. Immersive gallery, comfort presentation, location and direct booking.

latestNews.title: Latest news
latestNews.description: Projects, advice and Nova Baie life

method.title: A simple, clear and well-defined process
method.description: The project moves forward with a readable, structured and reassuring logic from the first exchange to launch.
method.duration: From the first discussion to launch: 3 to 6 weeks depending on the project.

steps.title: Initial exchange
steps.description: We discuss your structure, objectives and expectations. No commitment.

steps.title: Scoping & proposal
steps.description: We define the exact scope, the right service level and validate together.

steps.title: Creative direction
steps.description: Architecture, visual identity, tone and conversion logic. You validate before we code.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: Content and photo integration, mobile optimization and technical SEO.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: Full testing, access handover and post-launch support included.

aboutLink.title: 10 years of seasonal rental, a premium standard
aboutLink.p1: Behind Nova Baie is 10 years of direct seasonal rental practice — managed properties, welcomed guests, mastered platforms. Blue Baie Conciergerie was created in 2023 to structure this activity. Nova Baie is its digital branch.
aboutLink.p2: This field experience isn't a marketing argument. It's what allows us to build websites that truly resonate: for travelers and property owners alike, with a real understanding of visibility, trust and booking challenges.

cards.title: Real field knowledge
cards.text: Property owners, travelers, platforms: over 10 years of direct seasonal rental practice in the Bay of Somme.

cards.title: Quality standards on every project
cards.text: One level of output: premium. No templates, no compromise on image.

cards.title: Websites designed to convert
cards.text: Every design decision serves a clear business objective.

maintenance.title: Your site delivered, monitored and maintained
maintenance.description: Every project includes post-launch support. We stay available after going live.

about.title: Nova Baie, the web branch of Blue Baie Conciergerie
about.description: Born from concrete tourism and short-term rental practice, Nova Baie builds websites that speak the same language as your clients.
about.historyTitle: An agency born from the field, not an office
about.historyP1: Nova Baie is the digital arm of Blue Baie Conciergerie — same company, same standards, focused on one specific challenge: giving tourism professionals an online presence that matches their real offering.
about.historyP2: Blue Baie Conciergerie was born in 2023 from over 7 years of direct seasonal rental in the Bay of Somme. Nova Baie was launched in 2026 to meet a concrete need: giving tourism professionals a digital presence that matches their offering.

timeline.label: Since 2016
timeline.desc: Direct seasonal rental in the Bay of Somme
Launch of Nova Baie, premium web branch

about.bbDescription: Blue Baie Conciergerie manages high-end tourist accommodations in the Bay of Somme: guest welcoming, platform management, maintenance and owner follow-up.
about.missionP1: Bridging the gap between the real quality of a tourism offering and its online presentation, with more elegant, clearer and better structured websites.
about.missionP2: Nova Baie doesn't just sell a website. The brand builds a durable commercial tool in service of image, credibility and conversion.
about.dnaDescription: The desired tone remains premium, calm, reliable, structured and human.
about.metaTitle: About — Nova Baie, specialist tourism web agency
about.metaDescription: Nova Baie was born from 10 years of seasonal rental with Blue Baie Conciergerie. Unique expertise for creating websites that truly speak to travelers.
